_comment: Hand-crafted glosses by Claude, based on source_sentence context. 2026-02-24

a6.gloss: a building or venue code designation (A6-008 Auditorium)

abadie.gloss: (proper noun) Alberto Abadie, economist at Massachusetts Institute of Technology

achievement.gloss: a notable accomplishment reached through effort

acknowledgement.gloss: formal recognition of something's quality or importance

adjustments.gloss: small changes or modifications to improve something
